name: action1-mcp
description: Every Action1 endpoint, plus fleet-wide patch and vulnerability views across all your organizations.

action1_client_id.title: ACTION1_CLIENT_ID
action1_client_id.description: Client ID from the Action1 console's API Credentials page. With ACTION1_CLIENT_SECRET, the CLI mints a bearer token automatically. Create credentials at https://www.action1.com/api-documentation/.

action1_client_secret.title: ACTION1_CLIENT_SECRET
action1_client_secret.description: Client Secret paired with ACTION1_CLIENT_ID, from the Action1 console's API Credentials page.

action1_region.title: ACTION1_REGION
action1_region.description: Data-center shortcut: us (default), eu, or au. Match the region of your Action1 console URL.
